mapper.select: SELECT e.id AS user_id, e.name AS user_name, #{year} AS year, #{month} AS month, COUNT(ar.id) AS total_days, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN ar.status = 'normal' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS normal_days, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN ar.status = 'late' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS late_days, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN ar.status = 'early' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS early_days, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN ar.status = 'absent' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS absent_days, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN ar.status = 'leave' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS leave_days, ROUND( CASE WHEN COUNT(ar.id) = 0 THEN 0 ELSE SUM(CASE WHEN ar.status IN ('normal', 'late', 'early', 'leave') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(ar.id) * 100 END, 1 ) AS attendance_rate FROM employees e LEFT JOIN attendance_records ar ON e.id = ar.user_id AND ar.deleted_at IS NULL AND ar.date BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate} WHERE e.id = #{userId} AND e.deleted_at IS NULL GROUP BY e.id, e.name

SELECT e.department AS department, COUNT(e.id) AS total, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN ar.status IN ('normal', 'late', 'early') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS present, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN ar.status = 'late' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS late, COUNT(e.id) - COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN ar.status IN ('normal', 'late', 'early') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS absent, ROUND( CASE WHEN COUNT(e.id) = 0 THEN 0 ELSE COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN ar.status IN ('normal', 'late', 'early') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) / COUNT(e.id) * 100 END, 1 ) AS rate FROM employees e LEFT JOIN attendance_records ar ON e.id = ar.user_id AND ar.date = #{date} AND ar.deleted_at IS NULL WHERE e.deleted_at IS NULL GROUP BY e.department ORDER BY rate DESC, total DESC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM employees WHERE deleted_at IS NULL
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM attendance_records ar WHERE ar.date = #{date} AND ar.deleted_at IS NULL AND ar.status IN ('normal', 'late', 'early')

SELECT COUNT(e.id) FROM employees e LEFT JOIN attendance_records ar ON e.id = ar.user_id AND ar.date = #{date} AND ar.deleted_at IS NULL WHERE e.deleted_at IS NULL AND (ar.id IS NULL OR ar.status IN ('absent', 'leave'))
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM attendance_records WHERE date = #{date} AND deleted_at IS NULL AND status = 'late'

SELECT ROUND( CASE WHEN COUNT(ar.id) = 0 THEN 0 ELSE SUM(CASE WHEN ar.status IN ('normal', 'late', 'early') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(ar.id) * 100 END, 1 ) FROM attendance_records ar INNER JOIN employees e ON e.id = ar.user_id WHERE ar.deleted_at IS NULL AND e.deleted_at IS NULL AND ar.date BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate}

SELECT ar.user_id, e.name AS user_name, e.department, ar.status AS type, ar.date, CASE WHEN ar.status = 'late' THEN CONCAT('迟到，签到时间 ', TIME_FORMAT(ar.clock_in, '%H:%i')) WHEN ar.status = 'early' THEN CONCAT('早退，签退时间 ', TIME_FORMAT(ar.clock_out, '%H:%i')) WHEN ar.status = 'absent' THEN '缺勤' WHEN ar.status = 'leave' THEN '请假' ELSE ar.status END AS detail FROM attendance_records ar INNER JOIN employees e ON e.id = ar.user_id WHERE ar.date = #{date} AND ar.deleted_at IS NULL AND ar.status IN ('late', 'early', 'absent', 'leave') ORDER BY ar.id DESC LIMIT 10
